zh.lifeSummary: 當Benjamin Carpenter於1663年10月20日出生在美國麻薩諸塞州布里斯托時，他的父親Dea. William Carpenter31歲，母親Priscilla Bennett32歲。他於1690年3月4日與Hannah Strong在美國麻薩諸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1738年4月18日在美國康乃狄克州托藍德享年74歲，埋葬在美國康乃狄克州托藍德考文垂考文垂 蕾克內森 海爾 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benjamin Carpenter于1663年10月20日出生在美国马萨诸塞州布里斯托时，他的父亲Dea. William Carpenter31岁，母亲Priscilla Bennett32岁。他于1690年3月4日与Hannah Strong在美国马萨诸塞州哈普爾諾薩普頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1738年4月18日在美国康涅狄格州托藍德享年74岁，埋葬在美国康涅狄格州托藍德考文垂考文垂 蕾克內森 海爾 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Carpenter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): occupational name for a worker in wood, Norman French carpentier (from Late Latin carpentarius ‘cartwright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Zimmermann  , French   Charpentier  , Italian   Carpentieri  , or cognates and equivalents in various other languages.

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Fritz, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Gerd, Manfred, Wolfgang, Bernhard.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a carpenter, Middle High German zimberman (a compound of zimber, zim(m)er ‘timber, wood’ + man ‘man’), German Zimmermann.

nameMeanings.name: Benjamin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the youngest of the twelve sons of Jacob. His mother Rachel died in giving birth to him, and in her last moments she named him Benoni, meaning ‘son of my sorrow’. His father, however, did not wish him to bear such an ill-omened name, and renamed him Benyamin (Genesis 35:16–18; 42:4). This means either ‘son of the right hand’ or more likely ‘son of the south’ (Hebrew yamin can also mean ‘south’), since Benjamin was the only child of Jacob born in Canaan and not in Mesopotamia to the north. Another tradition is that the second element of the name is a variant of the Hebrew plural noun yamim, which means ‘days’ but is used idiomatically to mean ‘year’ or ‘years’. The name would then mean ‘son of (my) old age’ and refer to the fact that Benjamin was Jacob's youngest child. In the Middle Ages the name was often given to sons whose mothers had died in childbirth. Today it has no such unfortunate associations and it grew enormously in popularity following the release of the film The Graduate ( 1967 ), in which Dustin Hoffman played the role of Benjamin Braddock . It is used in Scotland as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Beathan .

en.lifeSummary: When Benjamin Carpenter was born on 20 October 1663, in Bristol, Massachusetts, United States, his father, Dea. William Carpenter, was 31 and his mother, Priscilla Bennett, was 32. He married Hannah Strong on 4 March 1690, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 18 April 1738, in Tolland, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 74, and was buried in Nathan Hale Cemetery, Coventry Lake, Coventry, Tolland, Connecticut, United States.

William Carpenterは31歳，母Priscilla Bennettは32歳であった。1690年3月4日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンでHannah Strongと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1738年4月18日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州トランドで74歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州トランドコベントリーコベントリー ラクナサン ヘイル セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Benjamin Carpenter(이)가 1663년 10월 20일 미국 매사추세츠 주 브리스톨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dea. William Carpenter(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Priscilla Bennett(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1690년 3월 4일 미국 매사추세츠 주 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 Hannah Strong(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1738년 4월 18일 미국 코네티컷 주 톨랜드에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 코네티컷 주 톨랜드 커븐트리 커븐트리 레이크 냇핸 헤일 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benjamin Carpenter nasceu em 20 de outubro de 1663, em Bristol, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Dea. William Carpenter, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Priscilla Bennett, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Strong em 4 de março de 1690, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de abril de 1738, em Tolland, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Nathan Hale Cemetery, Coventry Lake, Coventry, Tolland, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benjamin Carpenter родился 20 октября 1663 г. в местности бристол, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Dea. William Carpenter было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Priscilla Bennett, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Strong 4 марта 1690 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 18 апреля 1738 г. в местности толланд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности натань хэл кеметири, ковентри леик, ковентри, толланд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.
